# Radiomark

A standalone radio mark indicator component, used for displaying a radio selection state without the full Radio wrapper. Useful in custom selection UIs.

## Import

```jsx
import { Radiomark } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `checked` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the radio mark is in a checked/selected state |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the radio mark is disabled |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the radio mark |
| `variant` | `"solid" \| "outline" \| "subtle" \| "plain" \| "inverted"` | `"solid"` | The visual variant |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | - | The color palette for the radio mark |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Radiomark checked />
```

### Unchecked

```jsx
<Radiomark checked={false} />
```

### Sizes

```jsx
<Radiomark checked size="xs" />
<Radiomark checked size="sm" />
<Radiomark checked size="md" />
<Radiomark checked size="lg" />
```

### Variants

```jsx
<Radiomark checked variant="solid" />
<Radiomark checked variant="outline" />
<Radiomark checked variant="subtle" />
```

### Disabled

```jsx
<Radiomark checked disabled />
```

### In a custom list

```jsx
<HStack>
  <Radiomark checked={selectedItem === "option1"} />
  <Text>Option 1</Text>
</HStack>
```

## Features

- Standalone visual indicator without radio input behavior
- Displays filled dot when checked, empty circle when unchecked
- Multiple visual variants for different contexts
- Useful for building custom selection UIs, menus, and lists
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
